name: Recipe Secrets California Mashed Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 lb All-purpose potatoes, peeled (if desired) and cut into chunks
1 package Lipton Recipe Secrets Onion Soup Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, cover potatoes with water. Bring to a boil over high heat.
2. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes or until potatoes are very tender.
3. Drain the potatoes.
4. Return the potatoes to the saucepan.
5. Mash the potatoes.
6. Stir in parsley and onion soup mix blended with hot milk and sour cream.
